page.title: Support
page.heading: How can we help?
page.subtitle: Browse the documentation, contact us, or report a technical problem. Choose the channel that best fits your request.

channels.title: Support channels
channels.docs_body: Guides for configuring providers, agents, knowledge, connections, and deployments.
channels.email_body: For account, plan, billing, or incident enquiries that contain private information.
channels.github_body: If you found a reproducible bug in the project, open a public issue on GitHub.

before.title: Before contacting us
before.body: Include the version or environment, steps to reproduce, and the error message. Never publish API keys, passwords, or personal data.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.account_a: Use “Forgot your password?” on the sign-in page. If the email does not arrive or the account is locked, contact us from its associated email address.
faq.provider_q: A provider or model will not connect
faq.provider_a: Check the API key, base URL, and provider permissions. Then use the connection’s “Test” action and include the resulting error if it still fails.
faq.selfhosted_q: I need help with a self-hosted installation
faq.selfhosted_a: Include the operating system, Docker version, deployment file used, and logs from the affected containers.
faq.response_q: When will I receive a reply?
faq.response_a: Requests are handled according to the subscribed plan and severity. Security problems and loss of access receive priority.
